weak_aliases.reason: Source-local naming variants; useful for search, not merge authority.

suggestion.rationale: Same-object test (test 2): all four records share identical strong identity fields — project_name (Nostrand Ave/Rogers Ave SBS), project_type (Select Bus Service), corridor scope (9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay), and route served (B44 Limited→SBS). The three suffixed records (cac-2010, cb3, cb9-2010) are lifecycle records of the same durable project, each capturing a document-time moment (CAC meeting slides, CB3 presentation, CB9 presentation). Per project per-kind rule: 'Records of the same project produced by different documents (community-board presentations, CAC meetings, dated copies) DO merge into the base project record.' No contradicting strong identity fields across any pair. The validator_duplicate_identity on shared key project_nostrand-ave-rogers-ave-sbs confirms structural identity.
